## Getting Started

### Creating Your Account
1. Visit [website URL]
2. Click "Sign Up"
3. Enter your email and password
4. Verify your email address

### First Login
1. Go to login page
2. Enter credentials
3. Complete onboarding tour

## Advanced Usage

### Customization
#### Theme Settings
1. Go to Settings > Appearance
2. Choose color scheme
3. Upload custom logo

#### Notification Preferences
- Email notifications
- In-app alerts
- Webhook configurations

### Integrations
#### Connecting to [Service]
1. Navigate to Integrations
2. Select service
3. Authorize connection
4. Configure sync settings

#### API Access
- Generate API keys
- Webhook setup
- Rate limits

## Managing Your Account

### User Settings
- Profile information
- Change password
- Two-factor authentication

### Team Management
#### Adding Team Members
1. Go to Settings > Team
2. Click "Invite Member"
3. Enter email and assign role
4. User receives invitation

#### Roles & Permissions
| Role | Permissions |
|------|-------------|
| Owner | Full access, billing |
| Admin | Manage users, settings |
| Member | Use features, view data |

### Billing & Subscription
#### Viewing Plans
1. Go to Billing > Plans
2. Compare features
3. Select plan

#### Upgrading/Downgrading
1. Current plan highlighted
2. Select new plan
3. Confirm changes
4. Prorated billing applies

#### Payment Methods
- Add credit card
- Update billing info
- View invoices

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues
#### "I can't log in"
1. Reset password
2. Check email for verification
3. Clear browser cache

#### "Feature not working as expected"
1. Check browser compatibility
2. Verify permissions
3. Review configuration

### Error Messages
| Error Code | Meaning | Solution |
|------------|---------|----------|
| ERR_001 | Invalid credentials | Check username/password |
| ERR_002 | Permission denied | Contact administrator |
| ERR_003 | Resource not found | Verify resource exists |

### Performance Tips
- Optimize large datasets
- Schedule resource-intensive tasks
- Use filters effectively

## Best Practices

### Data Management
#### Importing Data
1. Prepare CSV file
2. Map columns
3. Validate before import
4. Review results

#### Exporting Data
- Export formats (CSV, JSON, Excel)
- Schedule regular exports
- Data retention policies

### Security Recommendations
1. Use strong passwords
2. Enable two-factor authentication
3. Regularly review team access
4. Monitor login activity

### Collaboration Tips
- Share dashboards with team
- Use comments for context
- Set up notification rules

## Frequently Asked Questions

### General
**Q: Is there a free trial?**
A: Yes, 14-day free trial with full features.

**Q: Can I cancel anytime?**
A: Yes, cancel from Billing settings.

### Technical
**Q: What browsers are supported?**
A: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (latest versions).

**Q: Is there an API?**
A: Yes, see API documentation.

### Billing
**Q: How is billing calculated?**
A: Monthly per user, prorated for changes.

**Q: Can I get an invoice?**
A: Yes, download from Billing > Invoices.
